credentialDescription: Optional outbound credential. Write-only — never displayed.
credentialWillClear: Credential will be cleared on save
deleteConfirm: Delete “{{token}}”? Any rule that publishes through it will fail to deliver until repointed. This cannot be undone.
descAwsStaticCreds: Static credentials are required; ambient/instance-role credentials are not used.
descBrokerUrls: One per line. At least one is required.
descKafkaAddresses: host:port, one per line. At least one is required.
descKafkaTls: Connect to the brokers over TLS.
descMqttClientId: Optional. A per-connection suffix is appended so many senders can share it.
descSnsEndpoint: Optional custom endpoint (e.g. a VPC endpoint or a test double).
description: Outbound targets a rule can publish to — brokers, cloud queues, and webhooks
dispatchVersion: Rules dispatch through version {{version}} (the latest published).
label: Label
notPublished: Not published yet — a rule can’t dispatch through this connector until you publish it.
publishConnectorDescription: Freeze the current draft into a new immutable version.
publishDisabledTitle: Save your draft changes before publishing
publishHint: Publishing freezes the saved draft into a new immutable version. Save your draft edits first, then publish.
rawConfigDescription: No structured editor for type “{{type}}”. Edit the raw config JSON; the server validates it.
restoreVersionConfirm: Copy version {{version}}'s configuration back into the draft? Your current unsaved draft edits will be replaced. Publish afterward to make it the version rules dispatch through.
saslUsernameRequired: SASL username is required when SASL is enabled.
secretAccessKeyDesc: The AWS secret access key paired with the access key ID above. Required.
secretPasswordDesc: The broker password for the username above. Optional.
secretSaslPasswordDesc: Required when SASL is enabled; the password for the SASL user.
title: Connectors
typeDescription: The transport this connector publishes through.
